name: 張裕煦
objective:
探討有關無機物質的化學性質、原子結構及化學反應。討論在材料及礦物上之應用。
Chemical properties, atomic structure and chemical reactions of inorganic chemicals will be discussed. Their applications to material science and minerals will be discussed too.
schedule:
WEEK	CONTENT
1 ~ 5	Chapter 1. Atomic structure
                Chapter 2. Molecular structures and bonding
                midterm 1
6 ~ 10     	Chapter 3. The structures of simple solids
                Chapter 4. Acids and bases
        	midterm 2
11 ~ 14	Chapter 5. Oxidation and reduction
                Chapter 6. Molecular symmetry
	        midterm 3
15 ~ 18   	Chapter 7. An introduction to coordination compounds
                Chapter 9. Periodic trends
                Chapter 10. Hydrogen
                Final
scorePolicy:
The final grade will be determined by:
25% (midterm 1) + 25% (midterm 2) + 
25% (midterm 3) + 25% (final) + attendance
materials:
Inorganic Chemistry – OXFORD 6th edition
Weller, Overton, Rourke, and Armstrong
課程對應SDGs指標: SDG4：優質教育（Quality Education）SDG7：可負擔的潔淨能源（Affordable and Clean Energy）
